arts.ttl: Cheltenham Town midfielder joins Wealdstone on loan
arts.sum: Boss Michael Flynn has regularly spoken about the Gloucester-born left-footer's technical prowess, but believes he needs to work on his all-round game before he is ready for regular League Two football. Cheltenham Town midfielder Harrison Sohna has joined National League club Wealdstone on loan until the end of the season.
